MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Reuben James Donig, Esq. 650-668-3600 Law Office for Plaintiff.
Carla N.Braunstein, Esq. 925.222.3400 WOOD SMITH HENNING & BERMAN LLP for Defendant Uber.

ARGUED. Ms. Braunstein sent a timely contest and presents arguments. The Court comments. Mr. Donig agrees with the court's tentative ruling and responds to arguments reaised by Ms. Braunstein.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
